posts.text:
All eyes on Nvidia.

Today, Nvidia is set to report Q1 earnings with revenue expectations at a massive $78.8 BILLION for the quarter.

That's an ~850% increase since Q1 2022, before ChatGPT was announced.

Options markets are pricing-in a 7% implied move in Nvidia, $NVDA, stock.

With a market cap of $5.4 trillion, markets are expecting a $380 BILLION swing in market cap.

Buckle up folks.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
